name: A01:2025-Broken Access Control
content: {"title":"Broken Access Control","severity":"high","overview":"Access control weaknesses allow users to act outside their intended permissions.","summary":"Broken access control occurs when restrictions are not properly enforced.","affected_endpoints":[{"method":"GET","path":"/api/users/{id}","description":"IDOR"}],"evidence":[{"title":"IDOR","request":"GET /api/users/1234","response":"200 OK with victim data"}],"impact_items":[{"title":"Unauthorized Data Access","explanation":"Attackers can access other users' data."}],"remediation_items":[{"action":"Server-side access control","fix":"Never rely on client-side controls.","code_snippet":null}],"steps_to_reproduce":"1. Log in. 2. Access another user's ID. 3. Observe data returned.","references":[{"title":"OWASP A01","url":"https://owasp.org/Top10/A01_2025/"}]}

name: A02:2025-Cryptographic Failures
content: {"title":"Cryptographic Failures","severity":"high","overview":"Sensitive data is inadequately protected.","summary":"Weak algorithms, hardcoded keys, missing TLS.","affected_endpoints":[{"method":"GET","path":"/","description":"Missing HSTS"}],"evidence":[{"title":"Weak cipher","request":"nmap --script ssl-enum-ciphers","response":"TLS_RSA_WITH_3DES_EDE_CBC_SHA supported"}],"impact_items":[{"title":"Data Breach","explanation":"Sensitive data can be intercepted."}],"remediation_items":[{"action":"Enforce TLS 1.3","fix":"Disable weak protocols.","code_snippet":null}],"steps_to_reproduce":"1. Scan TLS. 2. Identify weak ciphers.","references":[{"title":"OWASP A02","url":"https://owasp.org/Top10/A02_2025/"}]}

name: A03:2025-Injection
content: {"title":"Injection","severity":"critical","overview":"Untrusted data sent to an interpreter.","summary":"SQL, NoSQL, OS command, LDAP injection.","affected_endpoints":[{"method":"POST","path":"/api/search","description":"User input concatenated into SQL"}],"evidence":[{"title":"SQLi","request":"POST /api/search?q=' OR '1'='1","response":"200 OK with all records"}],"impact_items":[{"title":"Data Theft","explanation":"Arbitrary database records can be read."}],"remediation_items":[{"action":"Parameterized queries","fix":"Use prepared statements.","code_snippet":null}],"steps_to_reproduce":"1. Identify input fields. 2. Test SQL payloads.","references":[{"title":"OWASP A03","url":"https://owasp.org/Top10/A03_2025/"}]}

name: A04:2025-Insecure Design
content: {"title":"Insecure Design","severity":"medium","overview":"Fundamental architecture flaws.","summary":"Missing or ineffective control design.","affected_endpoints":[{"method":"POST","path":"/transfer","description":"No anti-CSRF token"}],"evidence":[{"title":"Missing transaction integrity","request":"POST /transfer","response":"200 OK"}],"impact_items":[{"title":"Business Logic Abuse","explanation":"Missing compensating controls."}],"remediation_items":[{"action":"Threat modeling","fix":"Model threats during design.","code_snippet":null}],"steps_to_reproduce":"1. Review architecture. 2. Identify flows without controls.","references":[{"title":"OWASP A04","url":"https://owasp.org/Top10/A04_2025/"}]}

name: A05:2025-Security Misconfiguration
content: {"title":"Security Misconfiguration","severity":"medium","overview":"Insecure defaults and verbose errors.","summary":"Most commonly seen vulnerability.","affected_endpoints":[{"method":"OPTIONS","path":"/","description":"Verbose server info"}],"evidence":[{"title":"Stack trace","request":"GET /api/users/search?sort=invalid","response":"500 with stack trace"}],"impact_items":[{"title":"Information Disclosure","explanation":"Config leaks reveal architecture."}],"remediation_items":[{"action":"Harden config","fix":"Disable unnecessary features.","code_snippet":null}],"steps_to_reproduce":"1. Send malformed requests. 2. Observe verbose errors.","references":[{"title":"OWASP A05","url":"https://owasp.org/Top10/A05_2025/"}]}

name: A06:2025-Vulnerable Components
content: {"title":"Vulnerable and Outdated Components","severity":"high","overview":"Components with known vulnerabilities.","summary":"Libraries, frameworks with published CVEs.","affected_endpoints":[{"method":"GET","path":"/","description":"Server header reveals version"}],"evidence":[{"title":"Known vulnerable version","request":"curl -I /","response":"Server: Apache/2.4.41"}],"impact_items":[{"title":"RCE","explanation":"Published CVEs exist."}],"remediation_items":[{"action":"SCA tools","fix":"Identify and update vulnerable deps.","code_snippet":null}],"steps_to_reproduce":"1. Identify versions. 2. Correlate with CVEs.","references":[{"title":"OWASP A06","url":"https://owasp.org/Top10/A06_2025/"}]}

name: A07:2025-Auth Failures
content: {"title":"Identification and Authentication Failures","severity":"critical","overview":"Weak authentication mechanisms.","summary":"Weak passwords, session fixation, missing MFA.","affected_endpoints":[{"method":"POST","path":"/api/auth/login","description":"No brute force protection"}],"evidence":[{"title":"Unlimited login attempts","request":"POST /login","response":"403 with no rate limit"}],"impact_items":[{"title":"Account Takeover","explanation":"Brute force and session hijacking."}],"remediation_items":[{"action":"MFA","fix":"Enforce WebAuthn/FIDO2.","code_snippet":null}],"steps_to_reproduce":"1. Attempt 100 logins. 2. Observe no rate limit.","references":[{"title":"OWASP A07","url":"https://owasp.org/Top10/A07_2025/"}]}

name: A08:2025-Integrity Failures
content: {"title":"Software and Data Integrity Failures","severity":"high","overview":"Missing integrity protections.","summary":"Deserialization of untrusted data, untrusted updates.","affected_endpoints":[{"method":"POST","path":"/api/upload","description":"Deserializes untrusted data"}],"evidence":[{"title":"Insecure deserialization","request":"POST /upload","response":"200 OK after deserialization"}],"impact_items":[{"title":"RCE","explanation":"Deserialization leads to RCE."}],"remediation_items":[{"action":"Avoid native deserialization","fix":"Use JSON or signed objects.","code_snippet":null}],"steps_to_reproduce":"1. Identify deserialization endpoints. 2. Craft payloads.","references":[{"title":"OWASP A08","url":"https://owasp.org/Top10/A08_2025/"}]}

name: A09:2025-Logging Failures
content: {"title":"Security Logging Failures","severity":"low","overview":"Insufficient logging enables undetected breaches.","summary":"No alerts on attack patterns.","affected_endpoints":[{"method":"GET","path":"/","description":"No WAF or SIEM alerts"}],"evidence":[{"title":"Missing audit logs","request":"Review server logs","response":"No auth events logged"}],"impact_items":[{"title":"Undetected Breach","explanation":"Attackers operate undetected."}],"remediation_items":[{"action":"Comprehensive logging","fix":"Log all auth events.","code_snippet":null}],"steps_to_reproduce":"1. Perform brute force. 2. Check logs. 3. Verify alerts.","references":[{"title":"OWASP A09","url":"https://owasp.org/Top10/A09_2025/"}]}

name: A10:2025-SSRF
content: {"title":"Server-Side Request Forgery","severity":"high","overview":"Server makes requests to unintended destinations.","summary":"User-supplied URL fetched without validation.","affected_endpoints":[{"method":"POST","path":"/api/fetch","description":"URL not validated"}],"evidence":[{"title":"AWS metadata","request":"POST /api/fetch with 169.254.169.254","response":"200 with IAM credentials"}],"impact_items":[{"title":"Cloud Credential Theft","explanation":"Metadata endpoints exposed."}],"remediation_items":[{"action":"URL validation","fix":"Block private IPs, use allowlists.","code_snippet":null}],"steps_to_reproduce":"1. Identify fetch endpoints. 2. Supply internal URLs.","references":[{"title":"OWASP A10","url":"https://owasp.org/Top10/A10_2025/"}]}
